expected_effect: Create anomaly detection skill to diagnose hidden evolution quality issues causing stagnation despite apparent success
rationale: System shows stable_success_plateau with score_inflation (71% of cycles score 0.85) and gene_monopoly — existing tools (scorecard, lint, trend-tracker) miss these pattern-level anomalies. A dedicated anomaly detector exposes root causes of stagnation.

strategy: Scan evolution narrative for anomalous patterns
Detect score inflation, gene monopoly, innovation drought, circular patterns, scope deflation
Compute health grade from anomaly count and severity
Output structured anomaly report with recommendations

summary: 创建 evo-anomaly-detector 技能（演化异常模式检测器），检测6类隐藏异常（分数固化/基因垄断/创新旱期/循环模式/范围通缩/退休基因使用），实际检出3个异常（等级B-），注册 gene_innovate_anomaly_detector（第12条基因），3文件~230行
